theme_and_archetype.description: A clean, trustworthy, and modern blue-and-white theme tailored for healthcare. Prioritizes hygiene, professionalism, and patient comfort.

primary.description: Main medical blue used for CTAs, prominent icons, and emphasized text.

secondary.description: Soft background tint to separate sections without using harsh grays.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900

sections.name: Navigation / Header
sections.layout: Sticky top, z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-100.
sections.content: Logo on left, Nav links center (Services, About, Testimonials, Contact), 'Book Appointment' CTA on right.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.layout: Two-column grid (grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2) with gap-12. Left: Typography + CTA. Right: Large hero image.
sections.content: Headline (e.g., 'Modern Dental Care for a Brighter Smile'), Subheadline explaining services, prominent 'Book Appointment' button. Image uses rounded-3xl with a subtle offset background blob or pattern.

sections.name: Services
sections.layout: Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-6. Section background: sky-50.
sections.content: Cards for General Dentistry, Cosmetic, Orthodontics, Emergency. Cards have white bg, rounded-2xl, blue icons, title, short description. Subtle hover lift.

sections.name: About the Doctor
sections.content: Doctor portrait image on left (rounded-3xl, shadow-lg). Text on right: Name, Credentials, short bio emphasizing care and experience.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.content: Testimonial cards with 5 blue stars, patient quote, small circular avatar, and patient name.

sections.name: Contact & Booking
sections.layout: Two-column grid. Left: Contact info, map/address, hours. Right: Booking form.
sections.content: Form uses Shadcn (Input, Select for service type, Date picker if available or text input, Textarea for message, submit Button). Section background: sky-50.

sections.name: Floating AI Chat Widget
sections.content: A rounded-full button with a MessageCircle icon. On click, toggles a chat panel (w-80 or w-96, rounded-2xl, shadow-2xl). The panel has a blue header ('Gemini AI Assistant'), a scrollable message area, and an input box at the bottom.

shadcn_usage: Sheet or generic Dialog/fixed div for the AI Chat toggle
components_strategy.icons: lucide-react (Tooth, Calendar, Phone, MapPin, Star, MessageCircle, Clock)

testing_guidelines.requirement: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.

hero_image.description: Bright and sterile dental clinic room featuring modern equipment.

doctor_portrait.description: A confident male dentist in a dental office, posing with arms crossed.

testimonials.description: Smiling female patient with long black hair.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts to the global CSS.
Use Tailwind HTML for major structure and Shadcn components for complex interactions like Forms and Selects.
Ensure the Floating AI Chat is visually distinct (bottom-right) and includes mock logic or Gemini API setup as per standard environment.
Strictly follow the color_palette to avoid muddy or neon colors. The theme MUST remain clean, blue, and white.
Use 'data-testid' on ALL CTAs, form inputs, and the chat widget buttons to satisfy testing protocols.
